reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio YPF. Ya todos las conocemos. Buen servicio y atención de la empleada (al ser un pueblo el trato es mas familiar). El sector de café Bar es pequeño, consta de 3 mesas aunque muy cálido.

(Translated by Google)
YPF gas station. We're all familiar with them. Good service and attentiveness from the staff (since it's a town, the atmosphere is more friendly). The coffee bar area is small, with just three tables, but very welcoming.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwejUzc3BBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena onda de los empleados.  También hay lugar para dormir,  más o menos 18 dólares x noche. Si venis viajando en esa zona hay varios lugares para parar a dormir y seguir  viaje

(Translated by Google)
The staff are very friendly. There's also a place to sleep, for about $18 a night. If you're traveling through that area, there are several places to stop and sleep before continuing your journey.

reviews.comment:
Pasamos a cargar y al baño ... 3 horas para limpiar el baño ... Nos fuimos y no pudimos pasar ... Mala atención..lenta...LENTAAAAAA..

(Translated by Google)
We went to charge our phone and use the restroom... It took 3 hours to clean the restroom... We left and couldn't go back in... Bad service... slow... SO SLOW...
